name: codex-harness-starter
description: Bootstrap a goal-specific Codex harness in a new directory with a minimal role set, starter structure, and first execution prompt.

interface.shortDescription: Generate a minimal Codex harness for a new project.
interface.longDescription: Helps users start from an empty directory, decide whether a harness is needed, choose the smallest useful role set, scaffold the initial files, and produce the first prompt to begin real work.
defaultPrompt: Design the smallest harness in this empty directory for turning a PRD into implementation work.
Decide the roles, starter files, and first prompt for a code review harness.
